commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio logs -n yanxi-validation -l job-name=sglang-bench-serving > /tmp/s4-baseline-bench.log 2>&1; wc -l /tmp/s4-baseline-bench.log'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp /tmp/s4-baseline-bench.log s3://yanxi-validation-788668107894/logs/s4-baseline-bench.log --region us-east-2'

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'POD=$(kubectl --context ohio get pod -n yanxi-validation -l job-name=sglang-bench-serving -o jsonpath="{.items[0].metadata.name}"); kubectl --context ohio cp -n yanxi-validation $POD:/results/bench.json /tmp/s4-baseline-bench.json 2>&1; aws s3 cp /tmp/s4-baseline-bench.json s3://yanxi-validation-788668107894/logs/s4-baseline-bench.json --region us-east-2 2>&1 || true'
